name: Redfin Estimate Checker
tagline: Find out if a home's digital estimate matches what buyers are actually paying.
description: Redfin's algorithm lags the real market — sometimes by months, sometimes by years. This skill back-calculates what Redfin estimated at the exact moment a home sold and compares it to the actual sale price, so you can see how far off the algorithm really was before making an offer.
whoFor: Home buyers and investors who want to know whether a listing price reflects what the market is actually doing — not what an algorithm guessed six months ago.
howItWorks: Give Claude a list of recently sold addresses. The skill navigates to each Redfin listing, reads the estimate history widget, and uses the 'change since sold' figure to back-calculate what Redfin thought the home was worth at the moment of sale. It then builds a table showing the gap between algorithm and reality for each address.
requirements: Claude desktop app with Cowork mode enabled, plus the Claude in Chrome extension installed and active in your Chrome browser.
